home.hero_desc: A developer who loves travel and technology, documenting life through code and a lens.
home.motto_subtitle: Life is not short of beauty, only the eyes to discover it.
home.motto_1_desc: Travel provides the opportunity to experience different cultures and landscapes firsthand, enriching your worldview with the history, art, and traditions of diverse regions.
home.motto_2_desc: Travel lets you escape the pressures of daily life, enjoy natural environments like beaches and mountains, and experience different climates to refresh your mind.
home.motto_3_desc: Travel helps you focus on the joy of the moment — savoring food, scenery, and activities — letting you set aside worries and fully embrace life.
home.motto_4_desc: Leaving familiar surroundings and being in new places helps you reassess your life and find fresh perspectives and new approaches to old problems.

about.title: About Me
about.desc: A developer who loves travel and technology. I solve problems with code, capture moments with a camera, and find answers on the road. I ride through mountain trails, drive to unfamiliar cities, cook a slow-simmered meal, play a few notes on the piano, and wait patiently for a seedling to sprout on the balcony — no grand ambitions, just the quiet joy of small, certain things.
about.hobbies: Travel · Cycling · Road trips · Photography · Cooking · Music · Piano · Drinks · Gardening · Gaming
about.letter_poem: 山静不知晚，水光自生晴。
about.letter_p1: 虽然我们从未真正相见，但你在我的心里已经有了一个位置。直到昨天，我才知道你的存在，也才知道你的事情。知道这件事的时候，我很难过，也有一种说不出的愧疚。我无法改变过去，也无法让你拥有那本应属于你的人生，但我想让你知道，你没有被遗忘。
about.letter_p2: 我为你取了一个名字——江晚晴。"晚晴"是雨过天晴的意思，是一天将尽时仍然明亮温暖的天空。我希望这个名字能承载我对你的祝愿：希望你在另一个世界里，是安宁的、温暖的，也是无忧无虑的。
about.letter_p3: 去年我养过一盆向日葵，它在阳光下开得很灿烂，我为它拍了很多照片。那时候我只是觉得花开得非常美。现在再回头看那些照片，我忽然觉得，也许那株向日葵就是你的化身。它那么明亮、那么温暖，就像我想象中你本该拥有的样子。以后我会带着那张向日葵的照片去看这个世界的美好，它就像你一样，陪着我去看每一份光、每一份温暖。
about.letter_p4: 每当我看到天空、雪花，或者清晨的第一缕阳光，我都会想到你，想到你本该拥有的一切美好。我会努力好好生活，也会把这份记住你的心情一直带在身边。
about.letter_thanks: 江晚晴，谢谢你曾经来到这个世界。我会记住你，也会在心里为你留一个位置。
